blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,993 ft. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 54 mph may cause lift holds.
